# 20th Street Auto Service — Complete Business Information

> Honest diagnostics, quality repairs, and fair pricing. Family-owned ASE-certified auto shop on N Dixie Hwy serving Boca Raton for 15+ years. Call (561) 465-5512.

## About 20th Street Auto Service

20th Street Auto Service is a trusted Localbusiness serving customers across the United States. With a focus on quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction, 20th Street Auto Service has built a reputation for delivering professional results at fair prices.
